summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Treasury Yields feature (US10Y/US30Y and spread). All 16 backend tests passed. All 6 frontend UI elements render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/treasury returns 200 status
✅ GET /api/treasury returns us10y, us30y, spread, curve_state, interpretation fields
✅ GET /api/treasury returns us10y > 0 (real data: 4.313%)
✅ GET /api/treasury returns us30y > 0 (real data: 4.890%)
✅ GET /api/treasury spread calculation correct (us30y - us10y = 0.577)
✅ GET /api/treasury curve_state is valid (NORMAL)
✅ GET /api/treasury has change tracking fields (us10y_change, us30y_change, spread_change)
✅ GET /api/treasury has monthly statistics (month_range, spread_month_mean)
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MNQ returns treasury object with us10y, us30y, spread, curve_state
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MES returns treasury with positive yields
✅ GET /api/volatility/MES includes treasury data
✅ GET /api/volatility/MNQ includes treasury data
✅ Treasury signal is valid (CONFIRM/CAUTION/NEUTRAL)
✅ Treasury score is in valid range (0-1)
✅ Treasury source is yahoo_finance
✅ Treasury has timestamp
✅ Frontend: Treasury/Yield Curve panel renders with data-testid='treasury-panel'
✅ Frontend: US10Y box renders with data-testid='treasury-us10y' showing 4.313%
✅ Frontend: US30Y box renders with data-testid='treasury-us30y' showing 4.890%
✅ Frontend: Spread box renders with data-testid='treasury-spread' showing +0.577
✅ Frontend: Curve state badge renders with data-testid='treasury-curve-state' showing NORMAL
✅ Frontend: Interpretation text renders with data-testid='treasury-interpretation'
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses real yfinance data from ^TNX (10Y) and ^TYX (30Y)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Treasury Yields feature fully tested. Backend fetches real data from yfinance using ^TNX (10Y) and ^TYX (30Y) tickers. Spread = US30Y - US10Y. Curve states: INVERTED (<-0.2), FLAT_INVERTED (-0.2 to 0), FLAT (0 to 0.3), NORMAL (0.3 to 0.8), STEEP (>0.8). Data cached for 5 minutes. All data-testid attributes in place for automated testing.

feature_verification.interpretation: Working - Portuguese text explaining curve implications
feature_verification.monthly_stats: Working - includes month range, mean, std for both yields and spread
